CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-25-2012 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-08-2012 Continued To Jul-24-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Oct-14-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
ROBERT N. WEAVER, ESQ. OF LESS & WEAVER'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL (FOR DEFENDANTS BRAINFLIRT.COM, LLC, A MICHIGAN LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY, URTURN.COM, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY, AND MARK SENDO).

APPEARANCES: Robert N. Weaver, Esq. of Less & Weaver 398-9800 moving to be relieved as counsel for defts; no other appearances.

RULING: The Court vacated its tentative ruling. Counsel provided a valid proof of service. Good cause showing and no opposition filed, the Court granted the motion. Order signed in open court. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
